title: alnus × hybrida var. intermedia
intro: Alnus × hybrida var. intermedia, also known as green alder or glossy alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a hybrid of the green alder (Alnus crispa) and the European alder (Alnus glutinosa). The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, primarily for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Alnus × hybrida var. intermedia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used externally to treat wounds and skin conditions, or internally to promote overall well-being.
